description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a simple, modern design, featuring a flat, smooth tabletop and four straight, sturdy legs. The wood grain is visible across the surface, giving it a natural and warm appearance. The table has a medium-brown finish, suggesting it is made from a hardwood such as walnut or cherry. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing its minimalist style. The edges and corners are slightly rounded for safety and comfort. Its proportions and robust construction make it suitable for communal or public use in urban parks, plazas, or outdoor seating areas.
description: A rectangular, medium-brown wooden table with a smooth top and four straight legs, featuring a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and all four legs, highlighting the table's rectangular shape and clean lines.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the tabletop and the depth of the table, with two legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the full tabletop and all four legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same narrow profile and two legs visible.
